channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Econet Zimbabwe begins building 100 MW solar plant in push for energy autonomy

item.title: ZC announces men’s technical team appointments, selection panel @3menonaboat
item.description:
The ZC Board endorsed recommendations from its Cricket Committee, chaired by Mr Blessing Ngondo, confirming the senior men’s coaching and support staff, the Zimbabwe Under-19 Men’s technical team and the national selection panels.

The post ZC announces men’s technical team appointments, selection panel first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Liquid strengthens enterprise AI offering with Microsoft Copilot accreditation @LiquidInTech
item.description: LIQUID Intelligent Technologies Zimbabwe has secured the Microsoft Copilot Specialisation, a strategic accreditation that enhances its position in the fast-growing enterprise artificial intelligence (AI) market. The Microsoft certification is awarded to partners that demonstrate advanced technical expertise and a proven record in deploying Microsoft Copilot solutions while meeting strict requirements on security, governance and customer [...] The post Liquid strengthens enterprise AI offering with Microsoft Copilot accreditation appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Dr Madzikanda’s love scandal further exposed: Shocking details revealed in court... “We are all his girlfriends, including some from touchline”
item.description: Harare – A sensational love triangle involving prominent business executive and academic, Dr. David Madzikanda, has taken a dramatic turn in the Harare Magistrates Court. Dr. Madzikanda, testifying as a State witness, candidly declared that the two women at the heart of the dispute – Tsitsi Mutseriwa and Millicent Murape – are both his girlfriends, [...] The post Dr Madzikanda’s love scandal further exposed: Shocking details revealed in court... “We are all his girlfriends, including some from touchline” first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: PPC seeks new buyer after US$30 million Arlington land deal collapses
item.description: PPC Zimbabwe has put its 418-hectare Arlington Property back on the market after a proposed US$30 million sale to Transvaal Africa collapsed following the buyer’s failure to meet the payment deadline. In an update to shareholders, PPC said it had not received the US$30 million purchase price from Transvaal Africa by June 30, 2026, resulting [...] The post PPC seeks new buyer after US$30 million Arlington land deal collapses appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: CAB3 Heads to Mnangagwa Amid Mounting Fears Over Constitutional Capture
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| The controversial Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Bill (CAB3) is now moving into its final stage, with... Continue reading "CAB3 Heads to Mnangagwa Amid Mounting Fears Over Constitutional Capture" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: CAB3 Cronyism: Mnangagwa Hands Top Rank to Trusted General
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| President Emmerson Mnangagwa has elevated Brigadier General Fidelis Mhonda to Major General, a move critics say is the... Continue reading "CAB3 Cronyism: Mnangagwa Hands Top Rank to Trusted General" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Is Zimbabwe’s economy finally turning a corner? Experts weigh in
item.description: Forbes Africa After years of runaway inflation and monetary instability, Zimbabwe is showing signs of macroeconomic recovery. The question now is whether the momentum can be sustained. Few economies have become as synonymous with inflation as Zimbabwe. Yet, over the past year, the country’s economic story has taken an unexpected turn. Annual inflation, which stood [...] The post Is Zimbabwe’s economy finally turning a corner? Experts weigh in appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Cross-border bus fares spike as Zimbabweans head home
item.description: Passengers travelling from Johannesburg to Bulawayo say cross-border bus fares have increased sharply, with some claiming operators have doubled their usual prices as demand for travel to Zimbabwe rises. Several travellers said they were forced to pay between R1,000 and R1,200 for trips that normally cost between R600 and R700. ‘We had no choice but [...] The post Cross-border bus fares spike as Zimbabweans head home appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Worsening public debt takes centre stage at AU dialogue in Zimbabwe
item.description: Channel Africa The African Union (AU) Commission, Wednesday launched a three-day high-level dialogue in Harare, aimed at tackling the continent’s worsening public debt crisis and reshaping its financial future. Running from July 1 to 3, the summit brings together Finance Ministers, central bankers, and global creditors under the theme, “From Crisis Response to Sustainable Financing: [...] The post Worsening public debt takes centre stage at AU dialogue in Zimbabwe appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mukuru cashier jailed nine years after diverting US$15,000 to fund Gokwe business
item.description: A cashier employed by Mukuru Money Transfers has been convicted of misappropriating thousands of dollars entrusted to her for customer cash disbursements after diverting the funds to establish a business in Gokwe. Masciline Chihambakwe (27), who worked for Send Money Home (Pvt) Ltd trading as Mukuru Money Transfers at Chireya Business Centre, was convicted by [...] The post Mukuru cashier jailed nine years after diverting US$15,000 to fund Gokwe business appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Yvonne Manwa bounces back as ZIFA CEO
item.description: The Zimbabwe Football Association (ZIFA) has appointed Yvonne Manwa as its new chief executive officer (CEO), marking her return to the association six months after her previous contract expired. Manwa, the former Ngezi Platinum Stars chief executive officer, previously served ZIFA for three years after joining the association during the FIFA-appointed Normalisation Committee’s tenure. She [...] The post Yvonne Manwa bounces back as ZIFA CEO appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mnangagwa pays tribute to Nkomo, opposition says he would have contradicted term extension agenda
item.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa on Wednesday paid tribute to late Vice-President Joshua Nkomo as a selfless champion of peace and unity, but his tribute drew immediate criticism from opposition figures, who said the liberation icon would never have supported attempts to amend the Constitution to prolong a president’s stay in office. Nkomo, affectionately known as Father [...] The post Mnangagwa pays tribute to Nkomo, opposition says he would have contradicted term extension agenda appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: ZC Board confirms national team appointments, selection panels @ZimCricketv
item.description: Zimbabwe Cricket (ZC) has thrown its full backing behind the coaching structure that guided Zimbabwe to the Super Eight stage of this year’s ICC Men’s T20 World Cup, with the Board retaining Head Coach Justin Sammons and his technical team while approving key appointments across the men’s high-performance pathway. Meeting in Harare on 23 [...] The post ZC Board confirms national team appointments, selection panels appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: Zimbabwe rout Bangladesh to record biggest-ever Test win
item.description: Zimbabwe produced a clinical all-round display to record their biggest Test victory in history, crushing Bangladesh by an innings and 85 runs on the third afternoon of the one-off Test at Harare Sports Club on Tuesday. After building a commanding first-innings lead of 270, the hosts dismissed Bangladesh for 185 in their second innings to [...] The post Zimbabwe rout Bangladesh to record biggest-ever Test win appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
